name: Chainqui Construction Development Co.,Ltd
summary: Chainqui Construction Development Co.,Ltd engages in the construction business in Taiwan. The company constructs commercial buildings and construction firms; and offers cement. It is also involved in the public housing rental and sales business. The company was formerly known as Chain Qui Development Co. Ltd. Chainqui Construction Development Co.,Ltd was founded in 1972 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
